scripts.build: bun run --filter '@templatical/media-library' build && bun run --filter '@templatical/types' build && bun run --filter '@templatical/core' --filter '@templatical/renderer' --filter '@templatical/import-beefree' build && bun run --filter '@templatical/vue' build
scripts.build:all-sdk: bun run build:email-editor && bun run build:media-library
scripts.ci: bun run format && bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run test
